description: As an IT Procurement Specialist, import 10 new assets from the vendor shipment manifest located at /home/ga/Documents/import_manifest.csv into Snipe-IT. Ensure all fields including Model, Category, Status, Location, Purchase Date, and Cost are correctly mapped. After the import is complete, update the serial numbers for two specific assets: set Asset ENG-LAB-003 to 'SN-DL7090-4523' and Asset ENG-LAB-008 to 'SN-DL5530-9902'. All other asset data should match the source CSV.
